relationships: ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsemt iman-nwent deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsem iman-nwen deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsed iman-nnem deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsed iman-nnek deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Tella ugar n tɣellist deg Lezzayer Tamaneɣt imir-a
ber:Imir-a atan idus ugar akk n wakken yella zik
ber:Aseggas ay d-yetteddun ad yili diri-t ugar
ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt tesri iɣladen yelhan ugar
ber:Paul yella ila tarmit d tameqqrant ugar deg usdar
ber:A win yufan, Dzayer Tamaneɣt ad tessewnennas ugar
ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt tesri tinedda yelhan ugar
ber:Tgamt laman deg yiman-nwent ugar n wanect yessefken
ber:Tamdint n Lezzayer tesri iɣladen yelhan ugar
ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt teḥwaj iɣladen yelhan ugar
ber:Tgamt taflest deg yiman-nwent ugar n wanect yessefken
ber:Leon yewwi-as-d i Rima d taddart d tameqqrant ugar
ber:Leɛmeṛ-inu qrib snat n tikkal ugar n leɛmeṛ-nwent
ber:Leɛmeṛ-inu qrib snat n tikkal ugar n leɛmeṛ-nnek
ber:Leɛmeṛ-inu qrib snat n tikkal ugar n leɛmeṛ-nnem
ber:Leɛmeṛ-inu qrib snat n tikkal ugar n leɛmeṛ-nwen
ber:Azal n umahil-inu meqqer acḥal n tikkal ugar waya
